scripts.test:all: chcp 65001 >nul && cross-env RUN_MODE=e2e codeceptjs run --config codecept.conf.js --steps --verbose
scripts.test:smoke: chcp 65001 >nul && cross-env RUN_MODE=smoke TESTS=tests/zz_smoke_test.js codeceptjs run --config codecept.conf.js --steps --verbose
scripts.test:multi: chcp 65001 >nul && cross-env RUN_MODE=e2e TESTS=tests/multi_url_add_remove_test.js codeceptjs run --config codecept.conf.js --steps --verbose
scripts.test:variants: chcp 65001 >nul && cross-env RUN_MODE=e2e TESTS=tests/variants_add_remove_test.js codeceptjs run --config codecept.conf.js --steps --verbose
scripts.e2e:multi: chcp 65001 >nul && cross-env DEMO_MODE=1 TESTS=tests/e2e/multi_url_add_remove_test.js DATASET=datasets/demo.txt npx codeceptjs run --config ./codecept.ci.conf.js --steps --verbose
scripts.e2e:colors: chcp 65001 >nul && cross-env DEMO_MODE=1 TOP_COLORS=3 TESTS=tests/e2e/top_colors_add_remove_test.js DATASET=datasets/demo.txt npx codeceptjs run --config ./codecept.ci.conf.js --steps --verbose
